notes:
**Joint release with keen-backend 0.20.0** — navigation coherence, reading-layout polish, list-scanning improvements, preview-pane chat, and Summary section fixes.

## Home & navigation

- **Summary is now "Home"** — the primary nav reads **Home, Projects, Tasks, Knowledge, AI Chat**. Default start page is Home (`/summary`); `⌥⌘1`–`⌥⌘5` follow the new order.
- **"Chat" renamed to "AI Chat"** — clearer workspace label; routes and shortcuts are unchanged.
- **Escape walks up the ownership chain** — from a task detail, `Esc` goes to its milestone or project parent (not always `/tasks`). From any top-level list, `Esc` goes to Home. History-based Back in the sidebar is unchanged.
- **Typing guard** — `Esc` in a search or text field no longer jumps you off the list.

## Reading layout

- **Consistent reading columns** — Task, Knowledge, Project, Milestone detail pages and Settings now share a `~736px` centered column.
- **Wider preview pane** — the multi-pane list preview is `2/5` of the window (was `1/3`).
- **Chat thread width** — short messages no longer float in a narrow centered strip; the thread uses the full reading width up to 1000px.

## List & entity UX

- **Alternating row colors** — optional zebra striping for Tasks, Projects, and Knowledge lists (Settings → General → List Views; off by default).
- **Related / Linked Items** — collapsible sub-sections on detail pages, plus a hide-completed toggle. Keyboard nav and drag-reorder respect collapsed/hidden rows.
- **Grouped Select menus** — dropdowns can show Task / Project / Milestone section headers (used in Summary filter editor).
- **Entity chat dock** — an always-visible "Ask about …" bar at the bottom of every multi-pane preview. Expands upward into a floating chat card; context follows focus but the conversation persists. Open in full chat or start a new conversation from the dock header.

## Summary sections

- **Unified create/edit dialog** — new custom sections use the same modal editor as edits.
- **Schedule time pickers** — start/end times use explicit "Not set" dropdowns (half-hour steps) instead of ambiguous native time inputs. Clearing a schedule now persists correctly.
- **Filter field picker** — grouped by Task, Project, and Milestone; ambiguous fields labeled (e.g. Task Tag vs Project Tag).
- **Sort by Order + cap + milestone dividers** — capped sections fill milestones in display order, milestone groups sort by board position, dividers always show when enabled, and ordering is stable across cap sizes.

## Fixes & polish

- **Custom theme card elevation** — light-mode `--card` no longer reads inverted; dark-mode recess softened.
- **Select dropdown readability** — menus use an opaque popover background instead of a translucent glass panel.
- **Activity feed heading** — matches other panel headings with an icon.

## Backend (Managed hosting & local server 0.20.0)

- **Deterministic task ordering** — `tasks(filter, sort)` appends a stable `created_at, id` tiebreaker so capped Summary sections return consistent prefixes (pairs with the desktop cap/divider fixes above).

## Install

| Platform | Artifact |
|---|---|
| Apple Silicon | `Keen_0.20.0_aarch64.dmg` |
| Intel Mac | `Keen_0.20.0_x64.dmg` |

Existing installs: **Keen → Check for Updates** or Settings → Updates.
